<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing up. Forward (row 06 column D) is lava `L`, so I can’t move there. The goal `G` is at row 05 column F, so I should head right to go around the lava. Turning right will face east toward the free floor at row 07 column E.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I see my current position at row 07 column D (marked `^`). Forward is row 06 column D, which is `.` (safe). The goal `G` is at row 05 column B, which is up and two columns to the left; but going forward is the first safe step toward getting above the obstacles and lava. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal `G` is at row 06 column B. I’m currently at row 07 column D, facing up. Forward (row 06 column D) is `.` so it’s safe, and moving up brings me closer while positioning to head toward column B next.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D (^) with the forward cell at row 06 column D currently unseen `?`, while moving up may risk lava or walls. I can see the goal at row 07 column B, which is two steps to the left, and the immediate left cell (row 07 column C) is `L` (lava), so I cannot go straight left. I need to reposition by turning to look for a safe route around the lava and wall block. I will turn left to face toward column C/left area to find a safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
From the current view, I can see forward (row 07 column D) is `^` behind me; I’m at row 07 column D facing left (since `G` is to my right at row 05? actually the goal is at row 05 column D with a wall at row 04). To reach the goal at row 05 column D, I need to move upward along column D, but row 06 column D is `L` (lava), so I must avoid going up. The safe way is to move to row 07 column C which is `.` and then try to approach the goal via row 06/05. Currently the cell to my left (row 07 column C) is `.` so I can move forward if I face left. I’m already facing left, so I will move forward into row 07 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
